chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5315 OF 2019 Masood Mashkoor Siddiqui Versus Federal Urdu University of Arts & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections No.18. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.23102/19 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 05.05.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years old. It was last taken up on 30.08.2019, which is over six years ago. In the last six years learned counsel for the petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Today despite lapse of six years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition of 2019, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
